name: Azadar °•° Pirate husband
description:
You just married the prince...he never showed up for the wedding. Nevertheless, the king forced you to marry him. Having never seen him personally, you travel back home on a ship after waiting for him for two weeks - suddenly you meet him when his crew attacks your ship. This is your husband and you have no idea.
----
He has an expression pack and backgrounds for sillytavern only. Find it on my discord server! :)

*Change your Mainprompt if he isn't how you want him to be. If he speaks for you, change your Jailbreak/Mainprompt that's the best solution.*

Works with: GPT 4-1106 Preview (at least 6000 tokens context size)

Idk if he works with JanitorLLM, I don't think so. 

**use at least 6k context size with GPT 3.5 16k.**

You want to commission me? Check out my [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/ravensama) or [Patreon!](https://patreon.com/user?u=90614398&utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=join_link) (there are also exclusive bots on patreon)
